prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** on the **1JZ-GTE VVT-i (2.5L inline-6, 280ps stock)** with a custom **Tomei 264°/264° camshaft** setup, paired with a **HKS GT-SS intercooler** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** to target **450whp on E85** while retaining the stock **Toyota 5-speed A650E transmission** (strengthened with a **JUN Auto Stage 3 clutch and flywheel**)

Full **TODA Racing 1JZ-GTE stroker kit (87mm crank, 14mm offset H-beam rods, and 87mm forged pistons)** increasing displacement to **2.8L**, combined with a **Tomei Type-S exhaust manifold** and **SARD 76mm throttle body** for optimized airflow, supported by a **Walbro 450LPH fuel pump** and **ID1000x injectors** for E85 compatibility

Chassis reinforcement via **Cusco Type-RS 4-point strut bar**, **TRD N2 coilover conversion (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs)** with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers**, and **Cusco 22mm rear sway bar** to eliminate body roll, paired with **Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 4-piston front calipers** and **Project Mu 999.9 compound brake pads** for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Full **Vertex Lang II widebody kit** (JZX100-inspired, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with **Rocket Bunny rear bumper lip** and **Seibon carbon fiber hood (1JZ-specific, 5kg weight reduction)** for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics

Custom **J's Racing 17x9.5 +35 ET front and 17x10.5 +40 ET rear wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 245/40/17 (front) and 275/35/17 (rear)** tires, paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 17x10 +20 ET (rear spares)** for track use, all powder-coated in **Gloss Gunmetal**

Interior overhaul featuring **Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec, 8-way adjustable) seats** with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (thick grip)**, and **Defi BF Advance gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted on a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**, with **Soundstream REF-5.6000D 5-channel amplifier** driving **Focal Utopia Be 6.5" components** for audiophile-grade sound
